sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ سَارَةُ بِالْفَخْرِ بَعْدَ أَنْ أَنْهَتْ رَسْمَهَا.
sentences.translation: Sara se osjećala ponosno nakon što je završila svoju sliku.
sentences.translationEn: Sara felt proud after she finished her drawing.

sentences.translation: Radila je na njoj strpljivo mnogo dana.
sentences.translationEn: She worked on it patiently for many days.

sentences.arabic: أَرَتِ الرَّسْمَ لِأُمِّهَا وَأَبِيهَا فَأُعْجِبَا بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pokazala je crtež majci i ocu i obradovali su se.
sentences.translationEn: She showed the drawing to her mother and father and they were impressed.

sentences.translation: Osjećaj ponosa nas tjera da radimo više.
sentences.translationEn: The feeling of pride makes us work more.
